title: Print more information about the SDF header
body:
This PR adds some printfs to output all the information about the SDF header.

I think this behavior is useful because this output is only printed on `-sdf-info` or `-sdf-verbose` and if you specify these arguments, you probably want all the information.

This PR adds the following output:

- SDF Version
- Divider
- Voltage (triple or scalar)
- Temperature (triple or scalar)

Which values are chosen from the min:typ:max expressions is determined with the `-Tmin|typ|max` argument passed to iverilog.

I tried to match the indentation style as it is, but it wasn't always clear to me what to choose. I think a unified indentation style, enforced by an auto formatter, would benefit Icarus very much. (But that's something for another time.)

I created a test (`sdf_header`) that reads in an sdf file with a complete header and compares the output to a golden reference. The test is registered in the new regression test script.

Since this is my first PR here, any comments regarding coding style/workflow/etc. are all very much welcome. Thanks!
